# SUNCELL Assistência Técnica de Celulares

SUNCELL is Curitiba's premier rapid mobile phone repair service, running inside secure local supermarkets (Mercado Goes) with free parking and high physical security.

## Core Services
- Screen Replacement (Troca de tela)
- Battery Replacement (Troca de bateria)
- Logic Board Repair (Reparo de placa-mãe)
- Charger Port Repair (Conector de carga)
- Data Recovery (Recuperação de dados)

## Supported Brands
- Apple iPhone (Video: `https://img.suncellassistencia.com.br/apple.mp4`)
- Samsung Galaxy (Video: `https://img.suncellassistencia.com.br/sansung.mp4`)
- Motorola (Video: `https://img.suncellassistencia.com.br/motorola.mp4`)
- Xiaomi Redmi/Poco (Video: `https://img.suncellassistencia.com.br/idem_Xiaomi_Xiaomi_Redmi_.mp4`)
- LG (Video: `https://img.suncellassistencia.com.br/lg.mp4`)

## Store Locations
- **Guaíra (Mercado Goes)**
  - Address: Rua Maria Moscardi Fanini, 261 - Guaíra, Curitiba - PR
  - Contact: +55 41 99917-6640
  - URL: `/loja/guaira`
- **Alto Boqueirão (Mercado Goes)**
  - Address: Rua Pastor Antônio Polito, 1805 - Alto Boqueirão, Curitiba - PR
  - Contact: +55 41 99917-6640
  - URL: `/loja/boqueirao`

## SEO & Accessibility Structure
- Over 80 programmatic landing pages for Curitiba neighborhoods, surrounding cities, and targeted brands.
- Built-in High-Contrast Header and pulsating navigation controls optimized for senior users (60+).
- Secure, server-side dynamic schema structures.
